title: Segment Source
description: A Segment source represents a data collection point that captures analytics events from a website, mobile app, server, or cloud application and sends them to Segment for routing to configured destinations.

id.description: The unique identifier of the source.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug of the source.

name.description: The display name of the source.

enabled.description: Whether the source is currently enabled and collecting data.

writeKeys.description: The write keys used to authenticate data sent to this source.

settings.description: Configuration settings specific to the source type.

labels.description: Labels applied to the source for organization and access control.

workspaceId.description: The ID of the workspace this source belongs to.

SourceMetadata.description: Metadata about the source type from the Segment catalog.

id.description: The metadata ID from the catalog.

name.description: The name of the source type.

slug.description: The slug of the source type.

description.description: A description of the source type.

Label.description: A label used to organize and control access to workspace resources.
